Name: The Multimodal Dataset to Investigate Task-Evoked Negative BOLD Response and Neurodegeneration

GeneratedBy.Name: BIDScoin
GeneratedBy.Description:: A flexible GUI application suite that converts source datasets to BIDS

Acknowledgements: We wanted to acknowledge all the participants that selflesly participated in this project.
HowToAcknowledge: Researchers should acknowledge this dataset, citing the dataset and the publication that will be added to the dataset in the future
Funding: Research reported in this publication was supported by the National Institute on Aging - National Institutes of Health grants awarded to Ray Razlighi: R01AG057962, R01AG085972 and by the the National Center For Advancing Translational Sciences of the National Institutes of Health under Award Number UL1TR002384. The content is solely the responsibility of the authors and does not necessarily represent the official views of the National Institutes of Health
EthicsApprovals: All research participants were consented in compliance with Weill Cornell Medicine Institutional Review Board.
